name: ETL Data Processing Pipeline
description: Scalable extract-transform-load pipeline with schema validation, enrichment, error quarantine, and warehouse loading.
author: Murphy System

nodes.label: Data Extractor
nodes.description: Pulls raw data from configured sources: databases, APIs, S3, or file uploads.

nodes.label: Schema Validator
nodes.description: Validates records against JSON Schema and flags malformed or missing fields.

nodes.label: Data Transformer
nodes.description: Applies business rules, type coercion, enrichment lookups, and field normalization.

nodes.label: Error Quarantine
nodes.description: Stores failed records with error metadata for manual review or reprocessing.

nodes.label: Warehouse Loader
nodes.description: Bulk-loads validated and transformed records into the target data warehouse.
